findings.description: Ensure that lists are structured correctly
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  List element has direct children that are not allowed: figure [<ol type="I">]

findings.description: Repeated PDF page footer content inserted between content sections in the HTML disrupts reading order.
findings.evidence: The footer block 'State of North Carolina | Division of Marine Fisheries | 3441 Arendell Street | P.O. Box 769 | Morehead City, North Carolina 28557 | 252-515-5500' appears between Section VI.J and Section VII (PENDER COUNTY) and again between Section IX.E and Section X (GENERAL INFORMATION) in the continuous HTML, interrupting the natural flow of the proclamation content.

findings.description: A full-width image is inserted mid-content between section VI (Onslow County) and section VII (Pender County), breaking the reading flow. This appears to be a page footer or header artifact from the PDF conversion inserted into the body rather than removed or consolidated.
findings.evidence: HTML contains placed between the closing of section VI's ordered list and the opening of section VII (Pender County). The PDF has no substantive image at this location; the page break between pages 1 and 2 occurs here.
